title: Trump mulls exiled Iranian dissident Reza Pahlavi as regime successor
fullText: NewsFeedUS President Donald Trump said he is not looking for somebody “who is no better” than Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as Iran’s leader, as exiled opposition figure Reza Pahlavi is discussed as a possible alternative. Trump said he wants a leader who can “bring it back for the people”.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: US President Donald Trump said Iranian dissident Reza Pahlavi could be a possible successor to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
